seo.title: HVAC & AC Repair Dallas | Regal HVAC Contractors | (469) 653-2950
seo.description: Top-rated HVAC repair & installation in Dallas. Trusted AC service since 2010. 100% satisfaction guaranteed. Call (469) 653-2950 for fast, expert service.

hero.headline: When Your AC Breaks, We Fix It Fast
hero.subheadline: Expert HVAC repair, maintenance, and installation in Dallas. Same-day service, upfront pricing, and a 100% satisfaction guarantee.

featureSections.title: AC Repair You Can Count On
featureSections.body: When the Texas heat hits, you need a team that responds fast. Our certified technicians arrive with the right tools and parts to get your AC back up and running—often the same day.
featureSections.cardBody: We stand behind every job. If you're not happy, we make it right—no questions asked.

featureSections.title: Preventive Maintenance Plans
featureSections.body: Keep your system running at peak efficiency with our affordable maintenance plans. Regular tune-ups extend equipment life, lower energy bills, and prevent costly breakdowns.
featureSections.cardBody: A well-maintained system uses up to 30% less energy. Our plans pay for themselves.

whyChooseUs.title: Locally Owned & Operated
whyChooseUs.description: We're your neighbors, not a national chain. We take pride in serving the Dallas community with personalized, honest service.

whyChooseUs.title: Certified & Experienced Technicians
whyChooseUs.description: Every technician is NATE-certified and undergoes continuous training. You get expert workmanship on every visit.

whyChooseUs.title: Upfront Pricing, No Surprises
whyChooseUs.description: We provide a detailed estimate before any work begins. What you see is what you pay—no hidden fees.

whyChooseUs.title: 24/7 Emergency Service
whyChooseUs.description: AC emergencies don't wait. Our team is available around the clock to handle urgent repairs, even on weekends.

testimonials.quote: Regal HVAC saved us during a heatwave! They arrived within two hours and fixed our AC quickly. Fair price and great communication.
testimonials.author: Sarah M.

testimonials.quote: We've used Regal for maintenance and a new installation. Professional, clean, and on time. Highly recommend.
testimonials.author: James T.

testimonials.quote: Honest and reliable. They diagnosed an issue that another company missed. Will only call Regal from now on.
testimonials.author: Maria L.

cta.headline: Ready to Beat the Heat?
cta.subheadline: Call us now or schedule online for fast, expert HVAC service.

servicesPage.intro: From emergency repairs to complete system installations, Regal HVAC offers a full range of heating and cooling services for Dallas homes and businesses. Every job is backed by our 100% satisfaction guarantee.

services.title: AC Repair & Service
services.shortDescription: Fast, reliable AC repair to restore your comfort quickly.
services.longDescription: When your air conditioner stops working, we act fast. Our technicians diagnose the issue accurately and fix it on the spot whenever possible. We service all makes and models, from split systems to packaged units.

process.title: Diagnosis
process.description: We thoroughly inspect your system to identify the root cause of the problem.

process.title: Transparent Quote
process.description: You receive a clear, itemized estimate before any work begins.

process.title: Repair & Test
process.description: We fix the issue, then test the system to ensure optimal performance.

faqs.question: How quickly can you get here?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day service for most calls. Emergency services are available 24/7.

faqs.question: Do you charge for estimates?
faqs.answer: No, our estimates are always free with no obligation.

services.title: AC Installation & Replacement
services.shortDescription: Expert installation of high-efficiency systems for lasting comfort.
services.longDescription: Upgrade to a new, energy-efficient system that saves money and keeps your home comfortable. We help you choose the right unit for your home size and budget, then install it with precision.

process.title: Home Assessment
process.description: We evaluate your home's cooling needs and recommend the best system.

process.title: Professional Installation
process.description: Our team installs the unit with attention to detail and code compliance.

process.title: System Tune-Up
process.description: We calibrate the system for peak efficiency and walk you through operation.

faqs.question: How long does installation take?
faqs.answer: Most installations are completed in one day.

faqs.question: Do you offer financing?
faqs.answer: Yes, we have flexible financing options with approved credit.

services.title: Heating & Furnace Services
services.shortDescription: Keep warm with expert furnace repair and installation.
services.longDescription: Don't let a broken furnace leave you in the cold. We repair and install all types of heating systems, including gas furnaces, heat pumps, and electric heaters. Our team ensures your home stays safe and warm.

process.title: Safety Inspection
process.description: We check for gas leaks, carbon monoxide, and other hazards.

process.title: Repair or Replace
process.description: We recommend the most cost-effective solution.

process.title: System Test
process.description: We run the system to ensure even heating and efficiency.

faqs.question: What are signs my furnace needs repair?
faqs.answer: Unusual noises, uneven heating, or rising energy bills are common signs.

faqs.question: Do you service heat pumps?
faqs.answer: Yes, we service all heat pump brands for both heating and cooling.

services.title: Ductwork & Indoor Air Quality
services.shortDescription: Cleaner air and efficient airflow with duct services.
services.longDescription: Your ductwork plays a huge role in comfort and air quality. We offer duct cleaning, sealing, and replacement to improve airflow, reduce allergens, and lower energy costs.

process.title: Duct Inspection
process.description: We use cameras to inspect ducts for leaks, blockages, or contaminants.

process.title: Cleaning & Sealing
process.description: We remove debris and seal leaks with professional-grade materials.

process.title: Air Quality Test
process.description: We test airflow and recommend upgrades like UV lights or filters.

faqs.question: How often should ducts be cleaned?
faqs.answer: Every 3-5 years, or sooner if you have pets or allergies.

faqs.question: Can duct sealing lower my bills?
faqs.answer: Yes, sealing leaks can improve efficiency by up to 20%.

about.headline: Dallas' Trusted HVAC Team Since 2010
about.mission: To provide honest, high-quality HVAC services that exceed expectations and ensure the comfort of every Dallas home and business.
story: Regal HVAC Contractors was founded in 2010 with a simple mission: treat every customer like family. What started as a two-person operation has grown into a trusted team of certified technicians serving thousands of Dallas residents. We believe in doing the job right the first time, with transparent pricing and a smile.

Over the years, we've built a reputation for reliability and integrity. Whether it's a late-night emergency repair or a full system replacement, we bring the same dedication to every call. We're proud to be a locally owned business that cares about its community.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We always tell the truth, even if it means recommending a repair instead of a more expensive replacement.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use top-grade materials and industry-best practices to ensure lasting results.

coreValues.title: Respect
coreValues.description: We treat your home with care, wearing shoe covers and cleaning up after every job.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We support local charities and give back to the Dallas area we call home.

contact.headline: Get Your Free Quote Today
contact.subheadline: Call us or fill out the form — we'll respond within 30 minutes.
